title: TT's Lib│特特的庫
description: Includes tags and predicates used in Special TT's Data Pack.│包含了特別的特特的資料包會用到的標籤和述詞。
body:
# Introduce│介紹
This Data Pack is primarily a dependency of Special TT's Data Pack. If you are also considering using it as a dependency for your Data Pack, you can [click here](https://github.com/specialTT/Special-TT-Project-Repository/tree/main/TT's%20Lib%E2%94%82%E7%89%B9%E7%89%B9%E7%9A%84%E5%BA%AB/tt's_lib_1.0.0%2B1.21.9/data) to view the new tags and predicates added to this Data Pack.│此資料包主要作為特別的特特的資料包的依賴項，如果你也考慮將其作為你的資料包的依賴項，可以[點此](https://github.com/specialTT/Special-TT-Project-Repository/tree/main/TT's%20Lib%E2%94%82%E7%89%B9%E7%89%B9%E7%9A%84%E5%BA%AB/tt's_lib_1.0.0%2B1.21.9/data)查看此資料包新增的標籤與述詞。
